---
title: "Expérience de Michelson-Morley"
execute:
  enabled: false
format:
  html:
    highlight-style: github

---

## Simulation

```{=html}
<div id="glowscript" class="glowscript">
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
<link type="text/css" href="https://www.glowscript.org/css/redmond/2.1/jquery-ui.custom.css" rel="stylesheet" />
<link type="text/css" href="https://www.glowscript.org/css/ide.css" rel="stylesheet" />
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/lib/jquery/2.1/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/lib/jquery/2.1/jquery-ui.custom.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/package/glow.3.2.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/package/RSrun.3.2.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript"><!--//--><![CDATA[//><!--

// START JAVASCRIPT
;(function() {;
var ρσ_modules = {};
var vEther, orientation, deltaL, longH, particules, courbe, compteur_fig;
ρσ_modules.pythonize = {};

(function(){
    function strings() {
        var string_funcs, exclude, name;
        string_funcs = set("capitalize strip lstrip rstrip islower isupper isspace lower upper swapcase center count endswith startswith find rfind index rindex format join ljust rjust partition rpartition replace split rsplit splitlines zfill".split(" "));
        if (!arguments.length) {
            exclude = (function(){
                var s = ρσ_set();
                s.jsset.add("split");
                s.jsset.add("replace");
                return s;
            })();
        } else if (arguments[0]) {
            exclude = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
        } else {
            exclude = null;
        }
        if (exclude) {
            string_funcs = string_funcs.difference(set(exclude));
        }
        var ρσ_Iter0 = string_funcs;
        ρσ_Iter0 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter0[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter0 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter0.keys() : ρσ_Iter0) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter0));
        for (var ρσ_Index0 of ρσ_Iter0) {
            name = ρσ_Index0;
            (ρσ_expr_temp = String.prototype)[(typeof name === "number" && name < 0) ? ρσ_expr_temp.length + name : name] = (ρσ_expr_temp = ρσ_str.prototype)[(typeof name === "number" && name < 0) ? ρσ_expr_temp.length + name : name];
        }
    };
    if (!strings.__module__) Object.defineProperties(strings, {
        __module__ : {value: "pythonize"}
    });

    ρσ_modules.pythonize.strings = strings;
})();
async function __main__() {
"use strict";
    var display = canvas;
    var scene = canvas();

    function input(arg) {
    	arg = arg || {}
    	if (arg.prompt !== undefined && arg.prompt != '') return prompt(arg.prompt)
    	else if (typeof arg === 'string') return prompt(arg)
    	else return prompt()
    }

    var version, print, arange, __name__, type, ρσ_ls, refEther, modifEther, orientation, lamb, c, longV, longH, deltaL, vEther, particules, posSource, posDetec, frequence, longOnde, amplitude, dt, dx, couleurs_fig, compteur_fig, suiveurs, ondes, eInput, eTexteSlider, oeInput, oeTexteSlider, bhInput, bhTexteSlider, ventEther, source, miroirH, miroirV, splitteur, detecteur, graph1, courbe;
    version = ρσ_list_decorate([ "3.2", "glowscript" ]);
    Array.prototype['+'] = function(r) {return this.concat(r)}
    Array.prototype['*'] = function(r) {return __array_times_number(this, r)}
    window.__GSlang = "vpython";
    print = GSprint;
    arange = range;
    __name__ = "__main__";
    type = pytype;
    var strings = ρσ_modules.pythonize.strings;

    strings();
    "14";
    scene.width = 600;
    "15";
    scene.height = 600;
    "16";
    scene.align = "left";
    "18";
    refEther = false;
    "19";
    modifEther = 1;
    "21";
    orientation = 0;
    "22";
    lamb = 2e-5;
    "23";
    c = 1;
    "24";
    longV = 20;
    "25";
    longH = 20;
    "26";
    deltaL = 0;
    "28";
    vEther = 0;
    "29";
    particules = ρσ_list_decorate([]);
    "31";
    posSource = vector(1["-u"]()["*"](10), 0, 0);
    "32";
    posDetec = vector(0, 1["-u"]()["*"](10), 0);
    "34";
    frequence = .25;
    "35";
    longOnde = 1["/"](frequence);
    "36";
    amplitude = 1;
    "38";
    dt = .01;
    "39";
    dx = .05;
    "41";
    couleurs_fig = ρσ_list_decorate([ color.black, color.gray(.5), color.orange, color.green, color.magenta, color.cyan, color.red ]);
    "42";
    compteur_fig = 0;
    "44";
    suiveurs = ρσ_list_decorate([]);
    "45";
    ondes = ρσ_list_decorate([]);
    "49";
    function onde() {;
    }
    onde.prototype.__init__ = async function __init__() {
        var self = this;
        var debut = ( 0 === arguments.length["-"](1) && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] !== null && typeof arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] === "object" && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] === true) ? undefined : arguments[0];
        var direction = ( 1 === arguments.length["-"](1) && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] !== null && typeof arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] === "object" && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] === true) ? undefined : arguments[1];
        var couleur = ( 2 === arguments.length["-"](1) && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] !== null && typeof arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] === "object" && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] === true) ? undefined : arguments[2];
        var amplitude = ( 3 === arguments.length["-"](1) && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] !== null && typeof arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] === "object" && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] === true) ? undefined : arguments[3];
        var frequence = (arguments[4] === undefined || ( 4 === arguments.length["-"](1) && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] !== null && typeof arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] === "object" && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] === true)) ? __init__.__defaults__.frequence : arguments[4];
        var dephasage = (arguments[5] === undefined || ( 5 === arguments.length["-"](1) && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] !== null && typeof arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] === "object" && arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)] [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] === true)) ? __init__.__defaults__.dephasage : arguments[5];
        var ρσ_kwargs_obj = arguments[arguments.length["-"](1)];
        if (ρσ_kwargs_obj === null || typeof ρσ_kwargs_obj !== "object" || ρσ_kwargs_obj [ρσ_kwargs_symbol] !== true) ρσ_kwargs_obj = {};
        if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(ρσ_kwargs_obj, "frequence")){
            frequence = ρσ_kwargs_obj.frequence;
        }
        if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(ρσ_kwargs_obj, "dephasage")){
            dephasage = ρσ_kwargs_obj.dephasage;
        }
        "51";
        self.amplitude = amplitude;
        "52";
        self.frequence = frequence;
        "53";
        self.dephasage = dephasage;
        "54";
        self.omega = 2["*"](pi)["*"](frequence);
        "55";
        self.dir = direction;
        "56";
        self.vertical = false;
        "57";
        self.pos = vector(debut);
        "58";
        self.avance = 1;
        "59";
        self.sphere = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, sphere, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: debut, radius: .1, color: couleur, make_trail: true, trail_type: "curve", interval: 1, retain: 1e3})]);
        "60";
        self.k = 2["*"](pi)["*"](frequence)["/"](c);
    };
    if (!onde.prototype.__init__.__defaults__) Object.defineProperties(onde.prototype.__init__, {
        __defaults__ : {value: {frequence:5, dephasage:0}},
        __handles_kwarg_interpolation__ : {value: true},
        __argnames__ : {value: ["debut", "direction", "couleur", "amplitude", "frequence", "dephasage"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });
    onde.__argnames__ = onde.prototype.__init__.__argnames__;
    onde.__handles_kwarg_interpolation__ = onde.prototype.__init__.__handles_kwarg_interpolation__;
    onde.prototype.updatekomega = async function updatekomega() {
        var self = this;
        var ρσ_ls, frequence_app;
        "63";
        frequence_app = self.frequence["/"](1["-"](1["*"](vEther)["*"](cos(orientation["*"](pi)))));
        "64";
        self.omega = 2["*"](pi)["*"](frequence_app);
        "65";
        self.k = 2["*"](pi)["*"](frequence_app);
    };
    if (!onde.prototype.updatekomega.__module__) Object.defineProperties(onde.prototype.updatekomega, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });
    onde.prototype.get_amplitude = async function get_amplitude(t) {
        var self = this;
        var ρσ_ls, axis, coord;
        "68";
        (await self.updatekomega());
        "69";
        axis = (!self.vertical) ? vector(1, 0, 0) : vector(0, 1, 0);
        "70";
        coord = dot(self.pos, axis);
        "71";
        return self.amplitude["*"](sin(self.k["*"](coord)["-"](1["*"](self.avance)["*"](self.omega)["*"](t))["+"](self.dephasage)));
    };
    if (!onde.prototype.get_amplitude.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(onde.prototype.get_amplitude, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["t"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });
    onde.prototype.update = async function update(t) {
        var self = this;
        var ρσ_ls, amp, crete;
        "74";
        amp = (await self.get_amplitude(t));
        "75";
        crete = (!self.vertical) ? vector(0, amp, 0) : vector(amp, 0, 0);
        "76";
        self.sphere.pos = self.pos["+"](crete);
        "77";
        self.pos=self.pos["+"](self.dir);
    };
    if (!onde.prototype.update.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(onde.prototype.update, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["t"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });
    onde.prototype.__repr__ = async function __repr__() {
                return "<"["+"](__name__)["+"](".")["+"](this.constructor.name)["+"](" #")["+"](this.ρσ_object_id)["+"](">");
    };
    onde.prototype.__str__ = async function __str__() {
        return this.__repr__();
    };
    Object.defineProperty(onde.prototype, "__bases__", {value: []});
    
    
    
    

    "79";
    async function majVitesse(ev) {
        "80";
        "81";
        try {
            "82";
            vEther = float(eInput.text);
            "83";
            if (vEther["<"](0)) {
                vEther = 0;
            }
            "84";
            if (vEther[">"](1)) {
                vEther = 1;
            }
            "85";
        } catch (ρσ_Exception) {
            ρσ_last_exception = ρσ_Exception;
            {
                "86";
                vEther = 0;
            } 
        }
        "87";
        eTexteSlider.text = " "["+"](ρσ_str.format("{:.1f}", vEther))["+"](" c");
        "89";
        ventEther.axis = modifEther["*"](vector(cos(orientation["*"](pi)), sin(orientation["*"](pi)), 0));
        "90";
        (await majInterference());
        "91";
        (await lancer_animation_onde());
    };
    if (!majVitesse.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(majVitesse, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "93";
    async function majOrientation(ev) {
        var ρσ_ls, direction;
        "94";
        "95";
        try {
            "96";
            orientation = float(oeInput.text);
            "97";
            if (orientation["<"](0)) {
                orientation = 0;
            }
            "98";
            if (orientation[">"](2)) {
                orientation = 2;
            }
            "99";
        } catch (ρσ_Exception) {
            ρσ_last_exception = ρσ_Exception;
            {
                "100";
                orientation = 0;
            } 
        }
        "101";
        oeTexteSlider.text = " "["+"](ρσ_str.format("{:.2f}", orientation))["+"](" Pi");
        "102";
        direction = vector(cos(orientation["*"](pi)), sin(orientation["*"](pi)), 0);
        "104";
        ventEther.axis = modifEther["*"](direction);
        "105";
        (await majInterference());
        "106";
        (await lancer_animation_onde());
    };
    if (!majOrientation.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(majOrientation, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "108";
    async function majDeltaL(ev) {
        "109";
        "110";
        try {
            "111";
            deltaL = int(bhInput.text);
            "112";
            if (deltaL["<"](1["-u"]()["*"](5))) {
                deltaL = 1["-u"]()["*"](5);
            }
            "113";
            if (deltaL[">"](5)) {
                deltaL = 5;
            }
            "114";
        } catch (ρσ_Exception) {
            ρσ_last_exception = ρσ_Exception;
            {
                "115";
                deltaL = 0;
            } 
        }
        "116";
        longH = longV["+"](deltaL["*"](longOnde["/"](2)));
        "117";
        bhTexteSlider.text = " "["+"](ρσ_str.format("{}", deltaL))["+"](" λ/4 ");
        "118";
        miroirH.pos = vector(longH["/"](2), 0, 0);
        "119";
        (await majInterference());
        "120";
        (await lancer_animation_onde());
    };
    if (!majDeltaL.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(majDeltaL, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "122";
    async function ajoutParticules(nombre, taille) {
        var ρσ_ls, pos, p, _;
        "123";
        "124";
        particules.clear();
        "125";
        for (var ρσ_Index1 = 0; ρσ_Index1["<"](nombre); ρσ_Index1++) {
            _ = ρσ_Index1;
            "126";
            pos = vector(random()["*"](30)["-"](1["*"](15)), random()["*"](30)["-"](1["*"](15)), random()["*"](2)["-"](1["*"](1)));
            "127";
            p = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, sphere, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: pos, radius: taille, color: color.white, opacity: .3})]);
            "128";
            particules.append(p);
        }
    };
    if (!ajoutParticules.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(ajoutParticules, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["nombre", "taille"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "130";
    async function majParticules() {
        var ρσ_ls, vitesse, p;
        "131";
        if (vEther[">"](0)) {
            "132";
            vitesse = 2["*"](ventEther.axis);
            "133";
            var ρσ_Iter2 = particules;
            ρσ_Iter2 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter2[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter2 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter2.keys() : ρσ_Iter2) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter2));
            for (var ρσ_Index2 of ρσ_Iter2) {
                p = ρσ_Index2;
                "134";
                p.pos=p.pos["+"](vitesse["*"](dt));
                "135";
                if (p.pos.x[">"](15)) {
                    p.pos.x = 1["-u"]()["*"](15);
                }
                "136";
                if (p.pos.x["<"](1["-u"]()["*"](15))) {
                    p.pos.x = 15;
                }
                "137";
                if (p.pos.y[">"](15)) {
                    p.pos.y = 1["-u"]()["*"](15);
                }
                "138";
                if (p.pos.y["<"](1["-u"]()["*"](15))) {
                    p.pos.y = 15;
                }
            }
        }
    };
    if (!majParticules.__module__) Object.defineProperties(majParticules, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "140";
    async function temps(L, orientation) {
        var ρσ_ls, terme1, terme2, terme3;
        "141";
        terme1 = 2["*"](L)["/"](c);
        "142";
        terme2 = sqrt(1["-"](1["*"](Math.pow(vEther, 2))["*"](Math.pow(sin(orientation["*"](pi)), 2))));
        "143";
        terme3 = 1["-"](1["*"](Math.pow(vEther, 2)));
        "144";
        return terme1["*"](terme2["/"](terme3));
    };
    if (!temps.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(temps, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["L", "orientation"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "146";
    async function majInterference() {
        var ρσ_ls, d0, alpha, t1, t2, delta_phi, i;
        "147";
        "148";
        courbe.remove();
        "149";
        d0 = abs(longH["-"](1["*"](longV)));
        "150";
        alpha = .1;
        "151";
        t1 = (await temps(longV, orientation["+"](1["/"](2))));
        "152";
        t2 = (await temps(longH, orientation));
        "153";
        delta_phi = 2["*"](pi)["*"](t1["-"](1["*"](t2)))["*"](c)["/"](lamb);
        "154";
        for (var ρσ_Index3 = 0; ρσ_Index3["<"](100); ρσ_Index3++) {
            i = ρσ_Index3;
            "155";
            courbe.plot(i, Math.pow(cos(2["*"](pi)["/"](5)["*"](i["*"](alpha)["+"](d0))["+"](delta_phi)), 2));
        }
    };
    if (!majInterference.__module__) Object.defineProperties(majInterference, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "158";
    async function dupliquerCourbe() {
        var ρσ_ls, couleur, courbe_snapshot, d0, alpha, t1, t2, delta_phi, y, i;
        "159";
        "160";
        couleur = ρσ_getitem(couleurs_fig, compteur_fig["%"](len(couleurs_fig)));
        "161";
        compteur_fig=compteur_fig["+"](1);
        "162";
        courbe_snapshot = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, gcurve, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({color: couleur})]);
        "163";
        d0 = abs(longH["-"](1["*"](longV)));
        "164";
        alpha = .1;
        "165";
        t1 = (await temps(longV, orientation["+"](1["/"](2))));
        "166";
        t2 = (await temps(longH, orientation));
        "167";
        delta_phi = 2["*"](pi)["*"](t1["-"](1["*"](t2)))["*"](c)["/"](lamb);
        "168";
        for (var ρσ_Index4 = 0; ρσ_Index4["<"](100); ρσ_Index4++) {
            i = ρσ_Index4;
            "169";
            y = Math.pow(cos(2["*"](pi)["/"](5)["*"](i["*"](alpha)["+"](d0))["+"](delta_phi)), 2);
            "170";
            courbe_snapshot.plot(i, y);
        }
    };
    if (!dupliquerCourbe.__module__) Object.defineProperties(dupliquerCourbe, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "172";
    async function animer_onde(onde1, onde2, onde3) {
        var ρσ_ls, t;
        "173";
        t = 0;
        "174";
        while (!(((onde1.pos["-"](1["*"](posDetec))).mag["<"](1) && (onde2.pos["-"](1["*"](posDetec))).mag["<"](1)))) {
            "175";
            if (abs(dot(onde1.pos, vector(1, 0, 0))["-"](1["*"](longH)["/"](2)))["<="](dx)) {
                "176";
                onde1.dir = 1["-u"]()["*"](onde1.dir);
                "177";
                onde1.avance = 1["-u"]()["*"](onde1.avance);
                "178";
            }
            if (abs(dot(onde3.pos, vector(1, 0, 0))["-"](1["*"](longH)["/"](2)))["<="](dx)) {
                "179";
                onde3.dir = 1["-u"]()["*"](onde3.dir);
                "180";
                onde3.avance = 1["-u"]()["*"](onde3.avance);
                "181";
            }
            if (abs(dot(onde1.pos, vector(1, 0, 0)))["<="](dx) && ρσ_equals(onde1.avance, 1["-u"]()["*"](1))) {
                "182";
                onde1.vertical = true;
                "183";
                onde1.dir = vector(0, 1["-u"]()["*"](dx), 0);
                "184";
            }
            if (abs(dot(onde2.pos, vector(1, 0, 0)))["<="](dx) && !onde2.vertical) {
                "185";
                onde2.vertical = true;
                "186";
                onde2.dir = vector(0, dx, 0);
                "187";
            }
            if (abs(dot(onde2.pos, vector(0, 1, 0))["-"](1["*"](longV)["/"](2)))["<="](dx)) {
                "188";
                onde2.dir = vector(0, 1["-u"]()["*"](dx), 0);
                "189";
                onde2.avance = 1["-u"]()["*"](onde2.avance);
            }
            "190";
            t=t["+"](dt);
            "191";
            if ((onde1.pos["-"](1["*"](posDetec))).mag[">"](1)) {
                "192";
                (await onde1.update(t));
                "193";
            }
            if (onde3.pos.mag[">"](1)) {
                "194";
                (await onde3.update(t));
                "196";
            }
            if ((onde2.pos["-"](1["*"](posDetec))).mag[">"](1)) {
                "197";
                (await onde2.update(t));
            }
        }
    };
    if (!animer_onde.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(animer_onde, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["onde1", "onde2", "onde3"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "200";
    async function lancer_animation_onde() {
        var ρσ_ls, o, _GS_1, onde1, onde2, onde3;
        "201";
        var ρσ_Iter5 = ondes;
        ρσ_Iter5 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter5[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter5 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter5.keys() : ρσ_Iter5) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter5));
        for (var ρσ_Index5 of ρσ_Iter5) {
            o = ρσ_Index5;
            "202";
            o.sphere.clear_trail();
            "203";
            o.sphere.visible = false;
        }
        "204";
        ondes.clear();
        "205";
        _GS_1 = new onde;
        (await _GS_1.__init__(posSource, vector(dx, 0, 0), color.blue, amplitude, frequence));
        onde1 = _GS_1;
        "206";
        _GS_1 = new onde;
        (await _GS_1.__init__(posSource, vector(dx, 0, 0), color.red, amplitude, frequence));
        onde2 = _GS_1;
        "207";
        _GS_1 = new onde;
        (await _GS_1.__init__(posSource, vector(dx, 0, 0), color.magenta, amplitude, frequence));
        onde3 = _GS_1;
        "208";
        ondes.append(onde1);
        "209";
        ondes.append(onde2);
        "210";
        ondes.append(onde3);
        "211";
        (await animer_onde(onde1, onde2, onde3));
    };
    if (!lancer_animation_onde.__module__) Object.defineProperties(lancer_animation_onde, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "213";
    async function boucle_particules() {
        "214";
        while (true) {
            "215";
            (await rate(100));
            "216";
            (await majParticules());
        }
    };
    if (!boucle_particules.__module__) Object.defineProperties(boucle_particules, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "222";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>Vitesse par rapport à l'ether (entre 0 et 1)<\/b><br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "223";
    eInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: majVitesse, text: "0.0", type: "numeric", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "224";
    eTexteSlider = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " c", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "225";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br><br>", pos: scene.pos = scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "227";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>Orientation de l'ether (entre 0 et 2)</b><br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "228";
    oeInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: majOrientation, text: "0.0", type: "numeric", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "229";
    oeTexteSlider = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " Pi", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "230";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br><br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "232";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>Différence de longueur (entre -5 et 5)</b><br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "233";
    bhInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: majDeltaL, text: "0", type: "numeric", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "234";
    bhTexteSlider = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " λ/4 ", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "235";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br><br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "240";
    ventEther = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vector(1["-u"]()["*"](longH)["/"](2), longV["/"](2), 0), axis: vector(1, 0, 0), color: color.cyan, shaftwidth: .3})]);
    "244";
    source = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, sphere, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: posSource, color: color.magenta})]);
    "245";
    miroirH = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, box, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vector(longH["/"](2), 0, 0), size: vector(.1, 4, 4), axis: vector(1, 0, 0), opacity: .8})]);
    "246";
    miroirV = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, box, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vector(0, longV["/"](2), 0), size: vector(.1, 4, 4), axis: vector(0, 1, 0), opacity: .8})]);
    "247";
    splitteur = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, box, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({size: vector(.1, 4, 4), axis: vector(1, 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0), opacity: .8})]);
    "248";
    detecteur = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, box, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: posDetec, size: vector(3, 2, 2), axis: vector(0, 1, 0), color: color.white})]);
    "252";
    graph1 = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, graph, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({title: "Intensité normalisée selon la distance sur le détecteur", xtitle: "Position sur l'écran (m)", ytitle: "I/I_max", width: 600, height: 400})]);
    "256";
    graph1.align = "right";
    "258";
    courbe = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, gcurve, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({color: color.blue})]);
    "259";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, button, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: dupliquerCourbe, text: "Garder en mémoire", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    "263";
    (await ajoutParticules(20, .5));
    "264";
    (await majInterference());
    "265";
    (await lancer_animation_onde());
    "266";
    (await boucle_particules());
};
if (!__main__.__module__) Object.defineProperties(__main__, {
    __module__ : {value: null}
});

;$(function(){ window.__context = { glowscript_container: $("#glowscript").removeAttr("id") }; __main__() })})()
// END JAVASCRIPT

//--><!]]></script>
</div>

```
